title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Adhesives & Allied Products - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Adhesives & Allied Products - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
